features: Matisse Prints Set: Featuring abstract pink plant silhouette, this canvas poster wall decor adds a touch of modern elegance to your living room, bedroom, or bathroom. Timeless and stylish design suits various interior styles

HD Posters Printing: This set of 3 framed wall art prints is crafted using premium canvas, ensuring vibrant colours and long-lasting. High-definition print captures every nuance, making it a standout piece for any wall

Easy to Hang: The wood frame is lightweight yet sturdy, making it easy to hang and move around as you update your home decor. The built-in hook for easy wall mounting, making the installation quick and hassle-free

3 Pack Home Decor: Set of 3, 30x40cm (12x16 inch) canvas prints, ideal for creating a cohesive look on your walls. Whether hung individually or grouped together, these framed prints blend effortlessly into various home decor themes, from contemporary to boho

Versatile Home Decor: Ideal for living room, bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, office, and even hallway. Its soft pink tone and boho chic aesthetic make it a versatile wall decor piece that complements a variety of interior design styles
description: Product Description Matisse Pink Framed Wall Art, Set of 3 30x40cm Abstract Botanical Canvas Wall Art What sets it apart from regular canvas paintings? 1.High-quality canvas material, resistant to creases and dents. 2.Giclee printing technology, ensuring vibrant colors and long-lasting durability Can it be used in the bathroom? Yes, the canvas print is waterproof, making it suitable for bathroom.However, it's recommended to keep it away fram direct water exposure to ensure its longevity. Is there a risk of blurring or fading? The framed wall art is printed using Epson printer with high-quality tech, fade-resistant, allowing it to retain its vibrant colours for a long time. Does the frame require any assembly? HesenDot framed poster comes with pre-installed hooks, so you can easily hang it directly on the wall without any additional tools or installation required. I received a defective product, what should I do? We are committed to providing you with high-quality canvas paintings and excellent after-sales service.
